title: poa nemoralis
intro: Poa nemoralis, also known as the wood meadow-grass, is a species of grass that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Poa nemoralis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
